scripts.stop: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$p=(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object State -eq 'Listen').OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique; if ($p) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force; Write-Host 'Port 5173 freed' } else { Write-Host 'Port 5173 already free' }"
